Hero.title: I see a problem, I build a solution.
Hero.subtitle: Fast.
Hero.description: AI Software Engineer with 7 years of full-stack experience. I build AI-powered systems, agentic workflows, and production-grade web applications.

About.title: About me
About.intro: Full-stack developer with 7 years of engineering experience, with the last 2 years focused on agentic AI, LLM integration, and AI-assisted development.
About.paragraph1: I work hands-on with Python, Anthropic/Claude APIs, local LLMs, RAG systems, and custom MCP servers. I'm an expert Claude Code user and I follow new AI tooling closely -- because there's something new every day.
About.paragraph2: My engineering foundation is in PHP/Symfony, Docker, and cloud infrastructure -- giving me strong production instincts alongside my AI work.

Services.title: What I Do
Services.description: From AI integration to full-stack development, I deliver solutions tailored to your business goals.
Services.aiDesc: Custom AI chatbots, agentic workflows with Claude/OpenAI, RAG pipelines, prompt engineering, and custom MCP servers that connect your AI to your data.
Services.devDesc: Production web applications with Django, Symfony, Laravel, and WordPress. From single apps to scalable multi-site architectures.
Services.consultDesc: I use AI as a core part of how I engineer products. Claude Code, agentic workflows, and modern tooling to accelerate delivery without compromising quality.

Experience.title: Experience
Experience.zaamsflowDesc: Consolidated 16 golf club websites into a single unified platform. Trained and deployed a custom AI chatbot fine-tuned on client content. Building web solutions from Django apps to scalable WordPress multi-site architectures.
Experience.zaamsflowTech: Python, Claude Code, MCP, Anthropic API, Django, WordPress, PHP, Symfony
Experience.rentmanDesc: Owned the entire Crew module of this event-industry SaaS. Designed a new HR system for holiday management and crew scheduling. Built an AI content generation feature. Refactored legacy APIs to typed Symfony objects. Scrum Master for a team of 5.
Experience.rentmanTech: PHP 8, Laravel, Symfony, MySQL, Docker, Angular, AWS
Experience.tikamoonDesc: Led a major platform migration: transferred 1M+ users to a new architecture. Restructured the entire product database through a clean REST API. Led front-end development and redesigned key product pages.
Experience.tikamoonTech: Sylius, Symfony 6, PHP 8, Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, JavaScript
Experience.insitactionDesc: Built back-end APIs and features using Symfony 4 / PHP 7, with React JS, Twig, and SCSS on the front end.
Experience.insitactionTech: Symfony 4, PHP 7, React JS, Twig, SCSS

Projects.title: Side Projects
Projects.vanBuilderDesc: AI-powered app that generates a personalised van conversion plan (steps, materials, curated videos) based on car model, budget, needs, and style.
Projects.invoiceDesc: Agentic tool that takes an invoice and autonomously negotiates a better price via email with supplier support using multi-turn LLM reasoning.
Projects.llmDesc: Trained and ran Llama locally, experimenting with instruction tuning, model behaviour, and performance on constrained hardware.

Skills.title: Tech Stack
Skills.aiItems: Agentic AI, LLM Integration (Claude, OpenAI, Llama), Custom MCP Servers, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Claude Code
Skills.frameworkItems: Symfony, Django, Laravel, React, Angular, Next.js
Skills.infraItems: Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, AWS, MySQL, RabbitMQ, CI/CD

Contact.title: Let's work together
Contact.description: Have a project in mind? I'm available for freelance work in Utrecht and remotely.

form.name: Name
form.successDesc: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

AboutMe.title: Beyond the Code
AboutMe.intro: I'm Hugo, a French engineer who moved to Utrecht two years ago. I build AI systems for a living, but I believe the best solutions come from real conversations -- not just Slack messages.
AboutMe.philosophy: Whether it's grabbing coffee in Utrecht or a video call, I prefer working closely with the people I build for. Human connection matters, even when building autonomous systems.
AboutMe.fact1: Originally from France, now based in Utrecht
AboutMe.fact3: Always up for a coffee chat about AI, tech, or life in the Netherlands

Hub.title: Latest Articles
Hub.description: Thoughts on AI, engineering, and building products.
